item.title: Images of Note: hey im furby
item.description:
Jesus!
Judging by some of the designs, it might be Pictish
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
always I wanna be with you, make believe with you and live in harmony, harmony, oh love!
ngl that goes hard.
it autism
oh shit
I see them everywhere
'Atsuneh Mikoo
dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance
:D
The 80s was a wild time.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Vet helps paralyzed puppy walk again.
item.description: This is just amazing. It was so demoralizing seeing Bunny stiff as a board, but knowing she was still all there. So glad there is a happy ending.

item.title: Ada Wong Microwave Edit IRL - cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DAWBAH-vdTC/ https://youtube.com/shorts/wRvXYYAlpHo For those who don't get the text on video, this trend is called the "microwave edit" which sounds funny to me, that is all haha Thank you for all the support on my Ada Wong transformation post yesterday! -yuzu

item.title: We've got to address the elephants in the room: They are taking up too much space and how did you get them in here?
item.dc:creator: ExtremeCowEnthusiast

item.title: Recreating Baldur's Gate 3 Hairstyles!
item.description:
Imgur only allows 60s videos so I had to split the video into 2 parts!
Part 2
#1 Partial Eclipse
#2 Bruenor Braids
#3 Topknot
#4 Furled Wings
Another shot of #4 because I was really proud of it
#5 Bohemian
#6 Mongoose Tail
#7 Luskan Plume
#8 Bakery Buns
#9 Trobairitz Knot (AKA my first Tavs hairstyle!)
#10 Orcscrews (I love the pun)
#11 Lone Wolf Bun
#12 Neverwinter Scarf
#13 Duster
#14 Bone Dance Braids
#15 Duchess Coronet
#16 Ramhorn Cascade
#17 Dewdrop
#18 Derlusk Sojourn
#19 Academy Dropout (I hated this one lol)
#20 Conqueror
#21 Fair Forester
#22 Chrysalis Pod
#23 Gemstone Droplet
#24 Ballerina Buns
#25 Braided Bunches
#26 Pinned and Perfect
#27 Innkeep Braid
#28/#29 Immortality/Wildcat (they're the same hairstyle on different lengths in game)
Bonus pic: my Ren Faire outfit this year, went dressed as my Tav!
Obviously had to do the iconic Bruenor Braids and everyone loved it (especially all the BG3 cosplayers I ran into there).
item.dc:creator: GingerSnark

item.title: Mommy Forums [OC]
item.description:
One of my 1st comics for the last few hours of the campaign!
BONUS Panel!
9 hours to go on the campaign and we have some awesome Kickstarter exclusive merch available! Come take a look and see if you can help us hit our stretch goal for Animated Out-Takes! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/litterboxanimation/pilot-episode?ref=f52qpp
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Eldritch Nursery Rhymes
item.description: Sauce: DrawerofDrawings, on Instagram. Screenshotted and cropped for your convenience. Shit all kinda sucks right now, all around. Check in on your friends. Tell people you love them. Punch a Nazi in the face. Make sure that you actually get rest during your down time, and try to avoid falling into the spiral. You got this. Most Viral Edit: Dang, y’all. Brought a smile to my face. I appreciate all of you wonderful weirdos, and it would make my day to see monkey gifs, they’re my favorite little rascals. Be kind to others, and ffs, be kind to yourselves. The world is hard enough without you being on your own side. Vote. Edit edit: @14367 with the full comic in one post in the comments, go upvote the nicer formatting!
item.dc:creator: RorytheRedKing

item.title: I bought ten of these signs to give to colleagues and neighbors. I suggest you do the same. They are made by a Black-owned company and are only $11 each.
